name: Chinese Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Brisket of beef or stew beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into bite-sized pieces and season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat the peanut oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
3. Add the beef to the pot and stir-fry until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Add enough water or broth to cover the beef by about an inch.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for about 2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
6. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
7. Serve hot over steamed rice.
